title: surwala robusta
intro: Surwala robusta, also known as Surwal or Surwala, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae and is native to India and Nepal. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Surwala robusta include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Surwala robusta include decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
